title: Pooparikka Solli Lyrics Malai Malai
stanzas:
Pooparikka solli
poovaa kaettukollum
naan parithu kondaal
koodaathendra sollum(2)

mai vizhi sillendra maargazhi
un mozhi sangeetha semmozhi
kai vazhi varaadho paingilkili
konjalaam nenjodu konjam vaadi

anbaana snegithaa
chinnatha settai seiyendaa
achchaaram enbathai
ippodhu poattu vaiyendaa

anbaana snegithi sollai
naan thaanda maattene
aanaalum sullena
unarchiyai thoonda mattene

punnaigai poovai veesi
enai boomiyil saaithaaye
manmadi serum munne
enai unmadi serthaaye

en vizhi thookkam paarthu
ingu aezhettu naalaachu
kannimai naangum verthu
nirkka kaaranam neeyaachu.

yaar yaarku yaaro
yaar solluvaaro
semmannum neerum
sernthaal pin vaero.

kanavil ninaikkavillai
kaalgal nadakkumullai
enakku kidaikkum ena naan.

anbaana snegithaa
chinnatha settai seiyendaa
achchaaram enbathai
ippodhu poattu vaiyendaa

anbaana snegithi sollai
naan thaanda maattene
aanaalum sullena
unarchiyai thoonda mattene

kaaranam indri dhegam
mazhi kaalathil verkiradhe
maiyalai enna solla
athu veiyilai vaarkirathe

veppathil vaadum podu
indha theppathil neeyeedhu
eppavum kadhal vandhaal
ingu aayiram kolaaru

nee indru vazhnthaal
neer thaedum verthaan
naam ondru sernthaal
vazhthaatho oorthaan.

enakku enakku endru
irukkum azhagu moththam
unaku unaku inimael.

anbaana snegithaa
chinnatha settai seiyendaa
achchaaram enbathai
ippodhu poattu vaiyendaa

anbaana snegithi sollai
naan thaanda maattene
aanaalum sullena
unarchiyai thoonda mattene

Pooparikka solli
poovaa kaettukollum
naan parithu kondaal
koodaathendra sollum

Pooparikka solli
poovaa kaettukollum
nee parithu kondaal
vendaamendraa sollum

seo.title: Pooparikka Solli Lyrics Malai Malai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pooparikka Solli, the lyrics express a playful and romantic dialogue between lovers, highlighting their affection and the beauty of their relationship. The song is set against the backdrop of the movie Malai Malai, where it serves as a celebration of love and connection. With its upbeat tempo and melodious composition by Mani Sharma, it evokes feelings of joy and happiness. The collaboration between Karthik and Shweta Mohan adds a charming touch, making it a memorable romantic number.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pooparikka Solli from Malai Malai is a delightful romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and joy. With Karthik and Shweta Mohan's enchanting vocals, this song is a perfect blend of melody and emotion, crafted by the talented music director Mani Sharma. Dive into the vibrant world of this track and let its uplifting vibe sweep you off your feet!
stanzaMeanings: If I say the flower is blooming, it won't be true if I feel sad about it.
Your words are like music in the month of Maargazhi, but the beautiful song doesn't reach the heart. Let's sing a little together.
Dear friend, don't make a fuss about small things. Don't let this strange thing affect us now.
I won't give you the words of love, but I won't stop your feelings from flowing.
The flower of joy has bloomed in my heart, and you have brought happiness into my life.
Looking at my reflection, I realize that the reason for my happiness is you.
Who says what to whom? When the red soil and water mix, something else happens.
I don't dream of what will happen; I just know that it will come to me.
Dear friend, don't make a fuss about small things. Don't let this strange thing affect us now.
I won't give you the words of love, but I won't stop your feelings from flowing.
Without a reason, the body is tired, and time is passing by without purpose.
In this heat, you are the one who is always here; when love comes, it brings a thousand joys.
If you live today, you will find something new; if we come together, we will celebrate.
The beauty that is within me is all yours from now on.
Dear friend, don't make a fuss about small things. Don't let this strange thing affect us now.
I won't give you the words of love, but I won't stop your feelings from flowing.
If I say the flower is blooming, it won't be true if you feel sad about it.
If I say the flower is blooming, it won't be true if you feel sad about it.
